name: Apple Blossom Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Mix all the ingredients well in a large bowl until combined.
3. Pour the batter into a greased cake pan and place it in the preheated oven.
4. Bake for 1 hour or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
5. Turn off the oven and let the cake cool inside with the door slightly open.
